Allocation assessment TN load corrections by bay segment and entity

Source: R/aa_corrections.R
aa_corrections.Rd

Allocation assessment TN load corrections by bay segment and entity

Usage

aa_corrections

Format

A data.frame

Details

TN load offsets applied before hydrologic normalization in anlz_aa. Two correction types are combined per entity: AD (atmospheric deposition) load estimates from anlz_ad, and permitted project load credits. The current object is a zero-row placeholder; it should be replaced with actual values when available.

  • bay_seg: Integer bay segment identifier

  • entity: MS4 jurisdiction or entity name

  • ad_tons: Atmospheric deposition TN offset (tons/yr)

  • project_tons: Permitted project TN offset (tons/yr)

See "data-raw/aa_corrections.R" for creation.

Examples

aa_corrections
#> # A tibble: 0 × 4
#> # ℹ 4 variables: bay_seg <int>, entity <chr>, ad_tons <dbl>, project_tons <dbl>
